entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant to produce functional pollen, found to be partial and without clear-cut segregation in the F2 population.

entities.name: ANNIGERI
entities.description: A plant line used as a parent in the cross to produce an F2 population.

entities.name: PM-L550
entities.description: A plant line used as a parent in the cross to produce an F2 population.

entities.name: F2 POPULATION
entities.description: The second filial generation resulting from genetic crosses.

entities.name: F1 POPULATION
entities.description: The first filial generation resulting from the cross between male-sterile plants and G130.

entities.name: G130
entities.description: A plant line used in crosses with male-sterile plants.

entities.name: MEIOSIS
entities.description: The process of cell division that was observed to be normal in the F1 population.

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability to produce offspring, which was fully present in the F1 population.

entities.name: SEGREGATION
entities.description: The genetic process of allele separation, which was not clear-cut for male sterility in the F2 population.

relationships.description: Lacked clear-cut segregation in the F2 population
